scripts.predev: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; const installCmd=ua.startsWith('npm/')?'npm install':'pnpm install'; if(!fs.existsSync('node_modules')||!fs.existsSync('apps/api/node_modules')||!fs.existsSync('apps/web/node_modules')){console.log('\n📦 Dependências faltando — executando '+installCmd+'...\n'); require('child_process').execSync(installCmd, {stdio:'inherit'})}"
scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; const installCmd=ua.startsWith('npm/')?'npm install':'pnpm install'; if(!fs.existsSync('node_modules')||!fs.existsSync('apps/api/node_modules')||!fs.existsSync('apps/web/node_modules')){console.log('\n📦 Dependências faltando — executando '+installCmd+'...\n'); require('child_process').execSync(installCmd, {stdio:'inherit'})}"
scripts.dev: npm run infra && turbo run dev
